prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招（+17.2%）对竞争的缓解、软科排名持续上升带来的正面效应以及福建省物理类考生持续增加（+6%）带来的竞争压力，考虑排名上升的正面效应略抵消考生增加压力，预测2026年物理类最低位次约28242名，区间27742–28742名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 23489 → 22980 → 25505 → 24169 → 25776, showing a fluctuating and slightly declining trend, with a cumulative decline of about 2800 places in the last 3 years; the baseline for 2025 is about 25776; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Fujian Province: 30 in 2021, 26 in 2022, 32 in 2023, 24 in 2024, 29 in 2025, and 34 in 2026, an increase of about 17.2% compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion and helps alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yanbian University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 198th in 2021 to 157th in 2026, showing continuous improvement in comprehensive strength and visibility; its Douyin popularity ranking is 79th, rated as 'average', with no major negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; the university's reputation is stable, with no obvious psychological disturbance in applications; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Yanbian University has no A- or above disciplines, with its advantageous disciplines featuring foreign language and literature (Korean direction), related to the Korean language in its enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's Physics Category enrollment majors include high-demand majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Clinical Medicine, as well as relatively stable majors like Tourism Management and Geography Science; the number of Physics Category examinees in Fujian Province increased from 117,000 in 2021 to 192,000 in 2025, with an estimated 204,000 in 2026, an increase of about 6% compared to 2025, indicating continuous expansion of the examinee pool and intensified competition; the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch cutoff is 441 points, with little fluctuation in recent years; Yanbian University is located in Yanbian Prefecture, Jilin Province, far from Fujian Province, requiring cross-province study; the university's enrollment proportion in Fujian Province is about 4%–5% (about 29 out of 598 nationwide in 2025), a medium-to-small scale, with limited impact from regional preferences on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating and declining trend of historical rankings, the significant expansion in 2026 (+17.2%) alleviating competition, the positive effect of the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings, and the competitive pressure from the increasing number of Physics Category examinees in Fujian Province (+6%), with the positive effect of the ranking rise slightly offsetting the pressure from increased examinees, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 28242, with a range of 27742–28742.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 27742–28742, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 27700), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 popular majors like Clinical Medicine and Computer Science; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 28700), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 2 majors and ensure Tier 3 safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 4511 → 4465 → 3762 → 5332 → 5970, showing a clear backward trend in recent years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2200 positions in the last 3 years; the baseline for 2025 is about 5970; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Fujian Province: 11 in 2021, 15 in 2022, 8 in 2023, 16 in 2024, 19 in 2025, and 14 in 2026, a reduction of about 26.3% compared to 2025, a significant reduction, leading to intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yanbian University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 198th in 2021 to 157th in 2026, showing a steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's overall strength and visibility; Douyin popularity ranking is 79th, rated as 'average', with no major negative public opinion or enrollment interruption records; the university's reputation is stable, with no obvious psychological disturbance in applications; Yanbian University has no A- or above disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, with its advantageous disciplines featuring foreign language and literature (Korean direction), related to the Korean and Japanese languages in the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The History Category enrollment majors at this university mainly include Chinese Language and Literature, Law, Korean, Japanese, and Geographical Sciences; Law has a hot social popularity but with differentiation and wait-and-see attitude, Chinese Language and Literature is recommended for social popularity, and small language majors have average popularity; the number of History Category examinees in Fujian Province decreased from 78,000 in 2021 to 57,000 in 2024, then rebounded to 60,000 in 2025, with an estimated 64,000 in 2026, an increase of about 6.7% compared to 2025, a slight rebound in examinee scale; the 2025 History Category undergraduate batch score is 450, with little fluctuation in recent years; Yanbian University is located in Yanbian Prefecture, Jilin Province, far from Fujian Province, requiring cross-province study; the university's enrollment proportion in Fujian Province is about 4%–5%, a medium-to-small scale, with limited impact of regional preference on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the clear backward trend in historical rankings, the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (-26.3%) leading to intensified competition, the positive effect of the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings, and the competitive pressure from a slight increase in Fujian Province History Category examinees (+6.7%), taking into account that the pressure from increased examinees slightly outweighs the positive effect of ranking rise, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 5127, with a range of 4627–5627.
